subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and beseemeth the Beloved of the world, Who, through the blessedness of the Most Great Name, hath quickened them that were dead [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالم را لایق و سزاست که بمبارکی اسم اعظم مرده گان را زنده نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @prayer for the departed, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
